# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Capture a rule that must hold across many inputs because example tests feel too narrow for the safety risk.
## Expected selection
use
## Why
A rule should hold across many inputs or states, and safety or correctness depends on broad input coverage.
## Expected object
A property or invariant statement that can be checked across a wide range of inputs.
## Boundary notes
Use this skill when the behavior is naturally expressed as a broad rule, not a narrow example or snapshot.
## Verification hooks
The response should emphasize generalized correctness and broad coverage rather than one-off cases.
